headline: Is Equity Residential (EQR) A Bargain After Its Dividend And Ahead Of Q2 Earnings?
summary: Equity Residential (EQR) is back in focus as investors look ahead to its fiscal 2026 Q2 earnings release on July 22 after the close, following a recently declared second quarter dividend. See our latest analysis for Equity Residential. Equity Residential shares closed at US$68.69, with a 90 day share price return of 12.35% and a year to date share price return of 10.74%, while the 1 year total shareholder return of 7.48% points to steady but moderate progress over a longer stretch.
